faqs.answer: Shalby Academy is famous for its infrastructure and various placement opportunities that it offers to students. The college infrastructure is good and the faculty is exerienced as well.

faqs.answer: Yes, admissions are open for various courses for 2023 at Shalby Academy. Candidates must visit the official website and apply online for admission.

faqs.question: What are the courses that Shalby Academy offers?
faqs.answer: Shalby Academy provides programmes including Certificate, UG Diploma, MBA/PGDM, DNB in streams such as Business & Management Studies, Medicine & Health Sciences, Nursing, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in HealthCare & Hospital, Hospital / Healthcare Management, Operation Theatre Technology, Nursing Assistant Nursing, Medical Laboratory Technology, Dialysis Technology, Critical Care Nursing, Geriatrics, Clinical Research, Radiology.

college_info.intro: Candidates willing to get admission to various courses must apply online on the official website of Shalby Academy. At the PG level, the college offers a two-year full-time MBA and various other courses to students. The college also provides six-month online E-Course in Advance Hospital Management. Some other programmes provided by the college are online certificate programmes with on-the-job training facilities, Fellowship courses, Up-Skilling Courses for Nurses, Continuous Professional Development programmes, Life Saver Courses Workshops & Training Programmes IEMS (hourly-based), and several other programmes for students. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by the Shalby Academy and their respective eligibility and Shalby Hospital Paramedical courses fees and various other courses fees:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Shalby Academy offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time and Part Time courses, from streams like Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies and Nursing. College offers UG Diploma courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like MBA/PGDM. The Shalby Academy course fee ranges between INR 29,500 to 2,45,000.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Overview not available

faqs.answer: A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by Government Medical College, Ratlam is up to 183. Good thing to know is that Government Medical College, Ratlam has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like NMC.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with the academics and hostels.

review_content.Placements: In our college per year, 180 students got admission to our college for the MBBS course. Students who passed four and a half years of MBBS will be eligible for an internship and get a 13,400 stipend. Interns have to do duty in government hospitals, and they are paid by the government.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our hostel and college is very good. There are sufficient classrooms to accommodate 180 students. Library facilities are also provided by the college, where we can read different books and also issue books for 10 days. The food quality in the mess is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Home away from home which you'll always cherish .

review_content.Placements: We do not have any placements in MBBS but rather, it's internship which starts after the final program of MBBS ends and continues for a year It is a compulsory step for all students and will teach you the real-life aspects of your course My internship will start from the Next year .
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is really good. The classrooms are spacious and equipped with all the technical facilities. The library is huge, remains open all day and night, and has all the books you need. The hostel is also good, with food available in the mess, which is average. There is a gym and an indoor sports room on our campus, as well as grounds for other outdoor games.

review_summary.college_name: Government Medical College, Ratlam Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Virtual tour of the college.

content.Placements: About 180 students are there in every batch. The internship is stipend around 13,000. When we clarify the need for a PG exam, we are able to get admission in PG post-graduation in various colleges all over the world. All over India, the top roles we got were like saving a person.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are very good and enough and the infrastructure of the college is very good. Wi-Fi is available in the library and respective labs are there regarding to their respective departments, like pathology and physiology. In physiology, we have hematology lab and a clinical lab and classrooms are very well mannered and library is like the very standard quality of the facilities I got in the hostel. A little bit of medium in rating the quality of the food is to average. There are about 223 canteens and all medical facilities, as it is also a medical college.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Government Medical College, Ratlam.

content.Placements: The batch comprises of 180 students and course if of 4.5 years and 1 year of mandatory internship. Each year has different subjects, like in 2nd year there is pharmacology microbiology and pathology. All the departments have professors and PGs too. PGs help in facilitating the course.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very nice and built in 2018. There is a library, hostel, sports ground, academic blocks and hospital too in the campus. The library have wifi facilities with AC. There are also cycle and scooter stands for bikes and proper water supply throughout the campus.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the academics and hostels.

content.Placements: In our college per year, 180 students got admission to our college for the MBBS course. Students who passed four and a half years of MBBS will be eligible for an internship and get a 13,400 stipend. Interns have to do duty in government hospitals, and they are paid by the government.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our hostel and college is very good. There are sufficient classrooms to accommodate 180 students. Library facilities are also provided by the college, where we can read different books and also issue books for 10 days. The food quality in the mess is good.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Home away from home which you'll always cherish .

content.Placements: We do not have any placements in MBBS but rather, it's internship which starts after the final program of MBBS ends and continues for a year It is a compulsory step for all students and will teach you the real-life aspects of your course My internship will start from the Next year .
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is really good. The classrooms are spacious and equipped with all the technical facilities. The library is huge, remains open all day and night, and has all the books you need. The hostel is also good, with food available in the mess, which is average. There is a gym and an indoor sports room on our campus, as well as grounds for other outdoor games.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and faculty members, but the environment is quite conservative.

content.Placements: After giving the NEET exam, if you qualify for the cutoff at this college, you will get into it. Each batch consists of 180 students. After completing MBBS, all students have to do an internship at this college. The roles offered at my college are MBBS nursing and post-graduation.
content.Infrastructure: As it is a government college established in 2018, its infrastructure is top-notch: AC and projectors are available in each lecture hall; a library and sports field for basketball and badminton are also available; and a mess and canteen are present in each hostel.

description: Government Medical College, Ratlam cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Government Medical College, Ratlam NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 13959 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Government Medical College, Ratlam MBBS cutoff 2025 was 13959 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 13292 for admission to the MBBS course. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Government Medical College, Ratlam accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. reviews.review_heading: Virtual tour of the college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good and enough and the infrastructure of the college is very good. Wi-Fi is available in the library and respective labs are there regarding to their respective departments, like pathology and physiology. In physiology, we have hematology lab and a clinical lab and classrooms are very well mannered and library is like the very standard quality of the facilities I got in the hostel. A little bit of medium in rating the quality of the food is to average. There are about 223 ca...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Medical College, Ratlam.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very nice and built in 2018. There is a library, hostel, sports ground, academic blocks and hospital too in the campus. The library have wifi facilities with AC. There are also cycle and scooter stands for bikes and proper water supply throughout the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the academics and hostels.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our hostel and college is very good. There are sufficient classrooms to accommodate 180 students. Library facilities are also provided by the college, where we can read different books and also issue books for 10 days. The food quality in the mess is good.

reviews.review_heading: Home away from home which you'll always cherish .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good. The classrooms are spacious and equipped with all the technical facilities. The library is huge, remains open all day and night, and has all the books you need. The hostel is also good, with food available in the mess, which is average. There is a gym and an indoor sports room on our campus, as well as grounds for other outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and faculty members, but the environment is quite conservative.
reviews.review_text: As it is a government college established in 2018, its infrastructure is top-notch: AC and projectors are available in each lecture hall; a library and sports field for basketball and badminton are also available; and a mess and canteen are present in each hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college.
reviews.review_text: The girls' hostel is very good; we have single rooms provided in this college only, so it is very good for us. Our college is very good as it is a new college, so the building is fresh. We have a library, smart classrooms, a mess canteen, and all types of sports facilities, including a gym.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Classrooms are very modern. Hostel facilities are good. Seniors are kind and helpful. Sports such as basketball, football, cricket, badminton, and table tennis are conducted.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Psychology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, I'm satisfied with teaching and infrastructure, but not satisfied with the placements.

review_content.Placements: About 40% of students got placed in famous hospitals. The highest package is about 8 LPA, the average is 3 LPA, and the lowest is 2 LPA. The top hospitals, like Kilpauk Medical Hospital, visit our campus. The top roles are service learning in community-based field work and clinical settings.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a library located in the college, LED screens in every classroom, and highly equipped labs. There are sports facilities, and they do conduct inter-department sports competitions and sports day. Physical education is compulsory to be completed in the first year of UG, but it is not good. Food experience is average, and there are good medical facilities for students.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Mathematics - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: My honest review about my college.

review_content.Placements: The placements and jobs are good. Every year most of the students are selected for any kind of company and choose their careers. Internships are also provided in my college. My course doesn't have internships but others have internships. Women's Christian College has the best placement opportunities. Many IT companies are let in for students. Almost everyone is placed on campus. Internships are done in our 2nd year and it's important to do an internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel infrastructure is good compared to others. The rooms are clean and good. Food which is provided in the mess also tastes well when compared to other hostels. Also, the hostel conducts many programs for students to showcase their talents.

overview_faqs.question: Is WCC a good option?
overview_faqs.answer: WCC is known for its dynamic quality of education. It's 100 years of existence is a testimony by itself. It's an autonomous institution. Bagging a seat is quite a task especially at UG level. Once entered, a world of multi dimensions opens up.As far as bunking is concerned its difficult to get past the security people once inside the campus. So she will have to take leave. But 85% attendance in every subject is a deal breaker. It's important to be cautious. It's not impossible to bunk though if the right tricks are known.Discipline wise it's all individual values. Anything against the rule book is treated with stern action.Well I hope I've given you an insight about life in WCC. In a nutshell it's 70:30 ratio of education and extracurriculars for UGs and 90:10 for PGs. Good luck to both of you.

review_summary.college_name: Women's Christian College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Data Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: WCC is a good place for growing in spiritual life. Also, we can gain more knowledge there.

content.Placements: There are many top companies hiring students from our college. 3 LPA above the packages they were providing. Accenture and the World Bank are the few companies that are hiring students from our college. The teachers encourage us to take part in every company.
content.Infrastructure: We are experiencing a good quality of campus life. Good hostel facilities, as a few friends are there, and the complaint is about the food only. We can get good food in the canteen. Also, sports are the best as they give more importance to sports quota students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Visual Communication - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Empowering Women in Excellence.

content.Placements: Around 25-30 percent of students get placed. The salary package ranges from 2.5 to 4 LPA. Major recruiting companies are production companies. Around 85-90 percent of students get internships in various fields in the industry as video editors, graphic designers, motion designers, directors, and costume designers.
content.Infrastructure: High quality multimedia lab with premium computers, updated software, and Wi-Fi are available. Clean and neat classrooms, editing suite, photography suite, and green matte studio. Hostel facilities are available with neat rooms. Sports facilities are provided with excellent coaches.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Psychology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Overall, I'm satisfied with teaching and infrastructure, but not satisfied with the placements.

content.Placements: About 40% of students got placed in famous hospitals. The highest package is about 8 LPA, the average is 3 LPA, and the lowest is 2 LPA. The top hospitals, like Kilpauk Medical Hospital, visit our campus. The top roles are service learning in community-based field work and clinical settings.
content.Infrastructure: There is a library located in the college, LED screens in every classroom, and highly equipped labs. There are sports facilities, and they do conduct inter-department sports competitions and sports day. Physical education is compulsory to be completed in the first year of UG, but it is not good. Food experience is average, and there are good medical facilities for students.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Mathematics - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My honest review about my college.

content.Placements: The placements and jobs are good. Every year most of the students are selected for any kind of company and choose their careers. Internships are also provided in my college. My course doesn't have internships but others have internships. Women's Christian College has the best placement opportunities. Many IT companies are let in for students. Almost everyone is placed on campus. Internships are done in our 2nd year and it's important to do an internship.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel infrastructure is good compared to others. The rooms are clean and good. Food which is provided in the mess also tastes well when compared to other hostels. Also, the hostel conducts many programs for students to showcase their talents.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Computer Application - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied because of the faculty members and management.

content.Placements: All students who applied for placements got placed. The is 5 LPA. All students have done internships from different companies like both private and government organisations. The most common role offered to students is teacher. The lowest package is 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure in our college is perfect. We don't lack anything. As far as I have heard from other colleges women's Christian college provides the best food and hostel facilities at a very minimum cost. Both veg and non-veg food are provided. Phone usage is prohibited during study hours. A day before the holiday, there will be no study hours. A common room is present in all hostels. The ancient building is perfectly maintained. We get to see how the infrastructure was built in the past and present. One TV is there in all the hostels. Students can excel in sports as well.

admission_process.title: Women's Christian College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: WCC admission process begins with registration. Candidates are required to select a course and fulfil the criteria specified by the college. Below is step-wiseWomen's Christian College admissiondetails:
STEP 1: WCC Application Process 2025

Candidates need to apply online for the course of their choice. A candidate may apply for any number of programmes in the Aided or Self-Financed sections. Aspirants need to pay an application fee to register for a course via any of the online payment modes.
STEP 2: Selection & Merit List

The college shortlists candidates based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. Departments will shortlist eligible candidates according to merit in various categories and send it to the Scrutiny Committee. The college releases a selection list for each course to announce the names of shortlisted aspirants.
STEP 3: Document Verification & Admission Confirmation
Once the selection process is done, selected candidates are called for document verification. Aspirants need to bring the below documents for verification:

Simultaneously candidates will receive SMS and email. Provisional Selection Notice can be downloaded from the candidate login from the college website. If the fee is not paid online within the stipulated date, the candidate will forfeit the seat. Aspirants need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the college.

WCC fee is a sum of multiple components such as tuition fee, caution deposit, hostel fee, etc. Candidates are required to pay tuition fee annually or semester-wise. Below is theWomen's Christian College feefor top courses:

faqs.question: How can I get seat in WCC college?
faqs.answer: Candidates are offered a seat in any of the UG or PG programme of WCC based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. Departments shortlist eligible candidates according to merit in various categories and send it to the Scrutiny Committee. The college releases a selection list for each course to announce the names of shortlisted aspirants. Once the selection process is done, selected candidates are called for document verification. Aspirants further need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the college.

faqs.question: Are admissions to various courses at Women's Christian College entrance-based?
faqs.answer: Women's Christian College does not accepts entrance exam for admission. The selection for courses is based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. The department selects eligible candidates according to merit in various categories and send it to the Scrutiny Committee. Selected candidates receive admission confirmation via SMS and email. The provisional selection notice can be downloaded from the candidate login in the college website.

faqs.question: Is it hard to get into WCC College?
faqs.answer: WCC College follows a simple admission process. Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the college for the course of their choice. Once they have registered, their applications are evaluated. WCC shortlists candidates based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants only need to ensure they score equal or above the eligibility percentage to get admission. The minimum aggregate is not defined in many of the courses. Hence, aspirants can easily get admission based on their qualification.

faqs.question: How much percentage is required for WCC College?
faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria defined the minimum qualification and percentage required to apply for a course at WCC. The criteria varies course-wise. Earlier, according to media reports, a total of 78 students have been placed during Women's Christian College placements 2023. Further, the salary package offered during stood between INR 4.30 LPA and INR 8.5 LPA . Further, a total of eight companies have visited the campus during WCC placements 2023.

faqs.question: Does WCC offer better placements than Ethiraj College for Women?
faqs.answer: Ethiraj College for Women has a dedicated job placement cell and internships are an important focus for them, especially for students pursuing programs in computer science, information technology, commerce and management.Various leading recruiters like TCS, Infosys, Cognizant and HDFC Bank visit Ethiraj College campus every year to recruit students for these professional courses.On the other hand, Women's Christian College, Chennai focuses mainly on undergraduate courses in pure arts and sciences such as physics, chemistry, botany and economics rather than professional degrees.Therefore, large-scale campus placement through large recruiting firms may not be the primary focus or activity of Women's Christian College. In conclusion, Ethiraj College appears to have a clear advantage when it comes to campus placement and providing employment opportunities to graduates of professional courses. The Women's Christian College focuses more on arts-based learning than corporate internships.

faqs.question: How are the placements for B.Sc course at WCC Chennai?
faqs.answer: The WCC BSc placements vary across the BSc speacialisations offered at the college. The average package offered during BSc placements at WCC ranges between INR 2.9 Lacs and INR 3.6 lakh. Based on the student reviews available on Shiksha.com, The highest pacakge offered to BSc students of various specialisations ranged between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA. Companies like Zoho, Amazon, ICICI and Infosys visit the college campus for recruitment. The students rated WCC placements at 4/5.

faqs.question: Which branch is best in B.Com at WCC?
faqs.answer: 1) Stella (Girls Only), Cathedral Road is the best branch in BCom at WCC. Its got to be at top in anybody's list. 2) MOP Vaishanav (Girls only), Thousand lights/Uttam gandhi Salai - As good as Stella. Should be in top 5 of anybody's list. 3) Ethiraj (Girls Only), Egmore- Again in top 5 for girls only 4) WCC (Girls only), College Road- I would keep it on par with Stella and MOP. You see same level of competition for seats, yet it's everyone's second or third choice for some reason . Top 5 in anybody's list 4) DG Vaishnav college (Co-ed), Arumbakkam- Only reason I would rank this below all others is it's location and plenty of parents would prefer a girls only college over a co-ed. 5) Madras Christian College (MCC), Tambaram (Co-ed)- Probably has the best campus out of the lot . Why isn't in top 5 of my pick . same reason as DG vaishnav. There are plenty of good colleges all cross the city . Above list are autonomous and self regulated, hence are preferred . Then there are alot of private colleges in far flung areas of city like SRM . I wouldn't recommend someone there.

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of WCC?
faqs.answer: Just eight companies were the top WCC recruiters. Women's Christian College, Chennai, arranges a number of seminars and placement cell programs for career guidance in addition to inviting reputable companies for campus recruitment. IBM, Wipro, Infosys, Google, HCL, Taj, Tech Mahindra, Fitness One, Cognizant, TCS, Amazon, Zoho, IBM, Wipro, ITC, TATA, and many more are among the top employers at the college. Numerous businesses in a variety of sectors have expressed interest in employing WCC graduates. Information technology (IT), banking and finance, consulting, media and communications, healthcare, and hospitality are a few industries that frequently hire WCC graduates.

faqs.question: What is the tuition fee for B.Com at WCC Chennai?
faqs.answer: The tuition fee for BCom at WCC is INR 2.4 lakh. This is the total tuition fee payable across three years. The fee amount may vary depending upon the candidate's board of education in Class 12 (State/CBSE/ICSE/Foreign). The other fee components include security deposit, hostel fee, mess fee, etc. Some fee components are paid once at the time of admission while others are payable semester-wise. It must be noted that mentioned fee has been sourced from the official website of the college/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BCom at WCC College?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for Women's Christian College BCom is INR 2.38 lakh . Candidates are required to pay the fee at the time of admission. Candidates are required to pay the fee for the first semester at the time of admission. nirf.description:
According to the rankings from NIRF, WCC outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. WCC's rankings in 'Colleges' category have shown a decreasing trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, WCC fell 34 ranks to #101 rank in the 'Colleges' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.

outlook.description:
WCC has been ranked well by the Outlook-ICARE under the 'Science' category. Through the years, the Outlook-ICARE rankings for WCC indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the Outlook-ICARE. It has been seen that in the 'Science' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, WCC's rank is #18, the same as last year's rank in the 'Science' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It has been seen that within the category of 'Arts', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, WCC's rank is #16, the same as last year's rank in the 'Arts' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'BBA' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, WCC fell 2 ranks to #54 rank in the 'BBA' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
In the 'BCA' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, WCC's rank is #11, the same as last year's rank in the 'BCA' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.

reviews.review_heading: WCC is a good place for growing in spiritual life. Also, we can gain more knowledge there.
reviews.review_text: We are experiencing a good quality of campus life. Good hostel facilities, as a few friends are there, and the complaint is about the food only. We can get good food in the canteen. Also, sports are the best as they give more importance to sports quota students.

reviews.review_heading: Empowering Women in Excellence.
reviews.review_text: High quality multimedia lab with premium computers, updated software, and Wi-Fi are available. Clean and neat classrooms, editing suite, photography suite, and green matte studio. Hostel facilities are available with neat rooms. Sports facilities are provided with excellent coaches.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, I'm satisfied with teaching and infrastructure, but not satisfied with the placements.
reviews.review_text: There is a library located in the college, LED screens in every classroom, and highly equipped labs. There are sports facilities, and they do conduct inter-department sports competitions and sports day. Physical education is compulsory to be completed in the first year of UG, but it is not good. Food experience is average, and there are good medical facilities for students.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review about my college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel infrastructure is good compared to others. The rooms are clean and good. Food which is provided in the mess also tastes well when compared to other hostels. Also, the hostel conducts many programs for students to showcase their talents.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of the faculty members and management.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure in our college is perfect. We don't lack anything. As far as I have heard from other colleges women's Christian college provides the best food and hostel facilities at a very minimum cost. Both veg and non-veg food are provided. Phone usage is prohibited during study hours. A day before the holiday, there will be no study hours. A common room is present in all hostels. The ancient building is perfectly maintained. We get to see how the infrastructure was built in the past and ...

reviews.review_heading: The honest review by a 2026 student.
reviews.review_text: There is a library with books covering all the topics. It also has a free Apollo pharmacy. We will have an assembly hour each week where there is a speaker to increase our knowledge about some topics.

reviews.review_heading: Women Christian College .
reviews.review_text: There are numerous facilities and factors available for the students on our campus. Some of them include a large library, which students can access during the day and is well-maintained and air-conditioned, Wi-Fi in most areas, and neatly set up computer and science labs. The hostel has all the homely facilities, and the food is also quite nice. There are 4 canteens and a few small shops too. The sports department also offers many games and activities.

reviews.review_heading: My best days in my college days .
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is very good. The lab, classrooms, and restrooms are always maintained very clean. The canteen is always good. If anyone has a medical problem, the medical room is always open. Our college supports so many sports, and they encourage the students to participate.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, average placements due to corona and layoffs.
reviews.review_text: There is a hostel inside the college where you are not allowed outside easily. It is very strict, but the environment in WCC looks beautiful with nature. I have also heard that it costs much to stay inside the WCC hostel. We do have a department library and a general library. We do have a lab, and for my UG IT department, we were using different classrooms to attend different subjects. Medical facilities are available. There is a canteen, but the break time won’t be enough to have lunch because ...

reviews.review_heading: Best college and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: They provide better infrastructure and facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, library, and classrooms available with separate departments. Hostel food quality is acceptable. The mess and canteen are very clean and hygienic. Medical facilities are available, and sports and games are conducted.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and better infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are very good. They provide Wi-Fi, labs, a library, and food. In our college hostel, they also provide electricity, food, and medical facilities. Sports and games are conducted every semester, and cultural events are performed.

reviews.review_heading: College with good faculty and facilities for the students.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure for the students in the Physiology course. The college has Wi-Fi, labs, a library, a canteen, hostels, sports facilities, etc. The facilities for the students are of good quality. The college hostel facilities are also of good quality. The mess food in the hostel is good to eat.

reviews.review_heading: A peaceful environment to excel in life.
reviews.review_text: Strong buildings; no damage happened during cyclone. We have gallery classrooms with laboratory of high facilities. The library is very big with innumerable books and AC facility. The food quality in mess is good; we have Apollo Shine care for medications. Only healthy food is provided, strictly. There are inter collegiate and intra departmental sports matches from time to time. Highly competitive environment for sports and games. The Sports day is the best event you have in the college.

reviews.review_heading: My college faculty is good and all facilities are available.
reviews.review_text: Although the hostel facilities are average, the affordability and quality of food are commendable. Moreover, the availability of medical facilities surpasses expectations. While the Wi-Fi connectivity in classrooms may be average, the laboratory infrastructure is top-notch. Certain blocks have excellent classrooms. The college takes pride in itself.

reviews.review_heading: Women's Christian College is a very disciplined college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure seems extremely wonderful. The facilities provided are very good. They have well-developed labs and a library. The food provided in the hostel is very good, but the timings are too early. The classrooms have a maximum of space. Phones are allowed inside the campus. The campus is filled with greenery.

college_info.college_name: Women's Christian College

data.description: Yes, Women's Christian College offers hostel facility to students. Admission to hostel is provisional and for one academic year only. Students are required to re-apply on payment of INR 100 at the end of the academic year, if they want accommodation for the next year.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Women's Christian College

likes.text: Companies like Amazon, Cognizant, Zoho, Infosys, Birla and many more visited the campus with job offers to students.

likes.text: Facilities like labs, classrooms, smart classrooms, library, sports field, indoor games, medical facilities with a doctor, ATM, computer labs, science laboratory, etc., were excellent.
I liked college mess food and also they had quite good medical facilities.

likes.text: The semester exam is not difficult but preparing and covering all portions, But wcc teachers are excellent at teaching.

likes.text: The thing to be improved about my course is the college can introduce some certificate courses based on chemistry, which will be helpful for the students in future.
It is an inter-college cultural held on our campus, in which we have various events being organised for students from the other colleges.

Note: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

The tuition fee for BCom at WCC is INR 2.4 lakh. This is the total tuition fee payable across three years. The fee amount may vary depending upon the candidate's board of education in Class 12 (State/CBSE/ICSE/Foreign). The other fee components include security deposit, hostel fee, mess fee, etc. Some fee components are paid once at the time of admission while others are payable semester-wise. It must be noted that mentioned fee has been sourced from the official website of the college/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

college_info.college_name: Surat Municipal Institute of Medical Education and Research: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Surat Municipal Institute of Medical Education and Research:

faqs.answer: A:    Surat Municipal Institute of Medical Education and Research has received an impressive review rating of 4.5 on Placements based on 2 feedback of verified Shiksha students.
faqs.question: Does Surat Municipal Institute of Medical Education and Research provide good placement facilities?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Surat Municipal Institute of Medical Education and Research offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely MBBS. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Surat Municipal Institute of Medical Education and Research offers MD, MS and PG Diploma. The fees for Surat Municipal Institute of Medical Education and Research courses range between INR 3,08,000 to 47,40,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Surat Municipal Institute of Medical Education and Research is a well-known institution for PG Diploma, MD, MS, MBBS courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Surat Municipal Institute of Medical Education and Research has course specializations in Obstetrics & Gynecology, Public Health, Radiology, Pediatrics, Anaesthesia, Anatomy, Biochemistry, Community Medicine, Dermatology, General Medicine, General Surgery, Microbiology, Ophthalmology, Orthopaedics, ENT, Pathology, Pharmacology, Physiology, Psychiatry.
faqs.question: What all specializations are provided by the courses offered at Surat Municipal Institute of Medical Education and Research?

review_content.Placements: Since we are studying in MBBS, there is no direct placement, but many of us get selected for PG courses in well-known institutes and the UPSC CMS exam. We do have internships at our college hospital in different departments, with an emergency post for a year with a good stipend.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a central library that is very spacious, fully air-conditioned and well-maintained. There is the availability of all the subject books, along with their references and journals related to the latest innovations in the field. The laboratories are well-equipped with the latest instruments. There are four blocks for each particular year, with separate lecture theatres, demonstration rooms, and small subject libraries for each, along with a museum.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: It is an amazing medical college with good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: We were studying in a medical college. So, we have a pass-out percentage of batch strength, it was about 75-80%. Although every student who clears M. B. B. S. got a job in the government or private sector as a medical officer. Every medical officer would get a minimum of 7.2 LPA in government set up as a contractual. No companies were there for medical officer placements. After completing 4.5 years of M. B. B. S. education there was a 1-year compulsory rotating internship in various departments. We would get a maximum of resident medical officers (Cl-1) after many years of medical officership.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Diploma in Public Health - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is an excellent place to gain practical knowledge.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides very good placements every year. Our college also provided internships in our college with a stipend of Rs. 13,000 to students. In this internship, students learn many lessons which are important for their future.
review_content.Infrastructure: Around 50% waiver is offered to the students of this college by the state government. It can be available to everybody. However, girls are offered free education by the state government at no cost. Hostel facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Well satisfied study infrastructure and faculty members, better practical knowledge .
reviews.review_text: There is a central library that is very spacious, fully air-conditioned and well-maintained. There is the availability of all the subject books, along with their references and journals related to the latest innovations in the field. The laboratories are well-equipped with the latest instruments. There are four blocks for each particular year, with separate lecture theatres, demonstration rooms, and small subject libraries for each, along with a museum.

reviews.review_heading: It is an amazing medical college with good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is amazing and has separate buildings for 1st year,2nd Year, and 3rd Year. Free Wi-Fi is available for everyone with high-speed unlimited internet in hospitals as well as the college campus. Classrooms have air-conditioners, fleximike, speaker, projector, and there are cushioned chairs in the lab demo room. Labs were there with each latest light microscopes and dissection hall. Library has certified author books with separate reading rooms for post-graduate & under-gra...

reviews.review_heading: Our college is an excellent place to gain practical knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Around 50% waiver is offered to the students of this college by the state government. It can be available to everybody. However, girls are offered free education by the state government at no cost. Hostel facilities are also good.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Education is really good.

content.Placements: The highest percentage is 80 percent of students were placed in this course. I am pursuing the course. I do not have much idea about the companies. My brother told me that in our college the recruitment is done by the top companies and offers well.
content.Infrastructure: Every facility is available in this college. Everything is well maintained and hygienic. Our canteen is also clean and hygienic and the quality of food is also good. Everything is well managed by the authorities. Classroom, library etc are well maintained.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Chemistry, Biotechnology, Microbiology) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good faculty members and placements.

content.Placements: Almost 50-80% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered was 5 LPA. The lowest salary offered was Rs 5,000 per month. The average salary offered ranges between Rs 25,000 per month - Rs 45,000 per month. Top recruiting companies are Sun Pharmaceutical Industries and Zydus Cadila Healthcare. Around 80-90% of students got internships in this course.
content.Infrastructure: Laboratory is very good. All facilities are available. The food served in the canteen is very good.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very good. The teaching quality is better. Our college has different teachers for each subject. They are helpful and skilled. Semester exams are moderate. The pass criterion is 7-9 CGPA.

content.Faculty: Our faculty members are very excellent, qualified, and experienced. Semseter exams are moderate and provide proper practice for final exams. There are three exams every semester, of which two are mid-semester exams, and the other is the final exam.

hostel_campus.college_name: Drs. Kiran and Pallavi Patel Global University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Separate hostel for boys and girls accommodating 450 and 170 students with fully furnished AC and Non AC (2 bed and 3 bed) rooms having attached bath, balcony and a common Dining Hall as well as Audio-Visual Lounge, Medical center, Direct Telephone Booth, Wi-Fi internet, Elevator, stand-by Electrical Power back-up Generator, Provision store, Laundry and Garden with Lush green Lawns

Separate hostel for boys and girls accommodating 450 and 170 students with fully furnished AC and Non AC (2 bed and 3 bed) rooms having attached bath, balcony and a common Dining Hall as well as Audio-Visual Lounge, Medical center, Direct Telephone Booth, Wi-Fi internet, Elevator, stand-by Electrical Power back-up Generator, Provision store, Laundry and Garden with Lush green Lawns

labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Language Lab, Mechanical Lab

reviews.review_heading: Education is really good.
reviews.review_text: Every facility is available in this college. Everything is well maintained and hygienic. Our canteen is also clean and hygienic and the quality of food is also good. Everything is well managed by the authorities. Classroom, library etc are well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good faculty members and placements.
reviews.review_text: Laboratory is very good. All facilities are available. The food served in the canteen is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Drs. Kiran and Pallavi Patel Global University.
reviews.review_text: There are two different hostel buildings for girls and boys. Our campus has around 2-3 Wi-Fi connections. The food served in every hostel is very good. Our college has 3-4 grounds for sports like volleyball, football, and cricket.

reviews.review_heading: I would not recommend taking admission here.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. The hostel is not good. The laundry service is not up to date. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games is not good. The Wi-Fi is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Campus is very huge and the teachers are very well educated.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is near campus. Nice food service. Excellent security. Huge campus with high-class teaching faculty. High-class greenery. Canteen facilities are there in the college. Every sports facility there in the college. Every year a sports week is conducted.

reviews.review_heading: Not good placement, supportive faculty, nice infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is really good and there are lush green gardens in our college. The labs and classrooms are good but the classroom doesn't have AC. The library is also very good and contains 2 floors. The hostel location is just beside the college and it s really good. The food quality is really good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the infrastructure and facilities on campus.
reviews.review_text: The college has one of the best infrastructures. The reason for giving 4 stars is the quality of food available in the mess. The mess food is below average I would say. The Wi-Fi facility and gymnasium are good. Labs also have a nice structure and facilities. The classrooms have nice ventilation and a proper study environment.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good infrastructure and teachers, but placements are not good.
reviews.review_text: Our college is full of greenery which is eye soothing. The infrastructure is good in our college but there is no air-conditioner in the classroom due to which students face difficulty in summers for attending lectures. The hostel is very good and contains a mess and a gym. The laboratories are good and the library is also good.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good faculty members and average infrastructure, but placements are not good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very greenery. It provides computer laboratories with the best internet connection. But classrooms are without air-conditioners so students are suffering on summer days. Smart classrooms are available but rarely students get a chance to visit, apart from a lush green garden.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good teachers, infrastructure, and facilities, but placements are not good.
reviews.review_text: The campus is very good with a lush garden. Our campus is very cool as there is a lot of greenery. The hostel is very good and well maintained. Rector sir is also very helpful and solves problems quickly. The classrooms do not contain air-conditioner which makes it difficult to attend a lecture in summer.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good faculty, poor placements, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good infrastructure with lush green gardens and a good environment. The campus is very good and classrooms are also good but there is no air-conditioner in classes because of which we suffer difficulties in summer. The campus also consists of a teapost and two stationeries.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and good placement .
reviews.review_text: College is located at a good area surrounded by a good environmental conditions and connected to a highway. The college has many facilities for sports and 2-3 play grounds. It also has well-equipped laboratory and workshops for every fields of students. It also provide hostel facility which has a valuable and reasonable price and provide good facility.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good placements and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the hostel is average. Sometimes hot water is not available. But the most important the hostel is clean and safe. The hostel rooms are big enough for 2-3 students. Facilities are also available like freeze, air-conditioners, chair, table, etc. The hostel has a volleyball ground and a cricket ground.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty and placement is average.
reviews.review_text: The college has very good infrastructure and campus is beautiful and facilities provided by our college is quite good and wi-fi provided by our college is with restriction and classrooms are very good and library is also good. Food quality in the canteen is quite good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the campus is good in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is pretty awesome, and you will feel like you are studying abroad. All labs and classrooms are perfect. But at some rainwater may create some problems in college, but overall there is no comprise in college or hostel infrastructure. The canteen and sports place are also good.

faqs.answer: A:    Shri Narayan Prasad Awasthi Government Ayurved College is a well-known institution for Certificate, MD, B.A.M.S. courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Shri Narayan Prasad Awasthi Government Ayurved College has course specializations in Ayurved.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied by infrastructure, and faculty members are good.

review_content.Placements: This is a professional medical course like any other. Here, students get a paid internship for 1 year, and if you are a merit-listed person, then a 1-year home surgeon job at our hospital. After that, you can prepare for PG, in which there is a handsome salary, like 60 to 70k, and after graduation, one can open a clinic or join a government hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a Wi-Fi facility in our library, and there are computers too. The classrooms are not that well-furnished, and the anatomy and physiology labs are not that good. But, yeah, we always have cadavers for dissection, which is a very good thing for students to understand the human body.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am so much satisfied by this college and courses.

review_content.Placements: About 15 percent of students were placed in our course due to a lack of opportunities in this course. The average package offered over here is around Rs 20-30 thousand.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are good but their infrastructure and facilities should be improved. Labs are in average condition and in proper apparatus but facilities should be improved. Library is in good condition. Hence, there are so many books available over here.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are good n knowledgeable and well educated. Their teaching quality should be improved somehow. The courses are curriculum relevant and it makes students industry ready.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied by infrastructure, and faculty members are good.

content.Placements: This is a professional medical course like any other. Here, students get a paid internship for 1 year, and if you are a merit-listed person, then a 1-year home surgeon job at our hospital. After that, you can prepare for PG, in which there is a handsome salary, like 60 to 70k, and after graduation, one can open a clinic or join a government hospital.
content.Infrastructure: We have a Wi-Fi facility in our library, and there are computers too. The classrooms are not that well-furnished, and the anatomy and physiology labs are not that good. But, yeah, we always have cadavers for dissection, which is a very good thing for students to understand the human body.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am so much satisfied by this college and courses.

content.Placements: About 15 percent of students were placed in our course due to a lack of opportunities in this course. The average package offered over here is around Rs 20-30 thousand.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are good but their infrastructure and facilities should be improved. Labs are in average condition and in proper apparatus but facilities should be improved. Library is in good condition. Hence, there are so many books available over here.
content.Faculty: Teachers are good n knowledgeable and well educated. Their teaching quality should be improved somehow. The courses are curriculum relevant and it makes students industry ready.

faqs.answer: A:    For admission to the MCA (Master of Computer Applications) program at Gurukula Kangri Vishwavidyalaya (GKV), Haridwar, the following entrance exams are accepted: 1. CUET PG (Common University Entrance Test - Postgraduate): GKV accepts CUET PG scores for MCA admissions, which is a national-level exam conducted for postgraduate programs at central universities like GKV.   2. NIMCET (NIT MCA Common Entrance Test): In some cases, GKV may also consider NIMCET scores, which is a national-level entrance exam for MCA programs conducted by NITs, although CUET PG has become the primary exam. Candidates must meet the minimum eligibility requirements and score the required cutoff in the respective entrance exams to qualify for admission.
faqs.question: What entrance exams are accepted by GKV Gurukula Kangri Vishwavidyalaya for admission to MCA?

faqs.answer: A:    For admission to the MBA course organized by Gurukula Kangri Vishwavidyalaya (GKV), the following documents are generally necessary:-MBA Admission Required Documents:Application Form: Duly filled out the application form for seeking admission.Entrance Exam Scorecard: Valid scorecard of CAT, MAT, CMAT, GRE, or CUET-PGMark Sheets: Marks sheets of all qualifications held previous to it viz. 10th, 12th, and graduation.Degree Certificate: Provisional or original degree certificate of graduation.Id Proof: Govt. issued ID- Aadhar card/passport/voter ID etc.).Passport-size Photographs: Recent photographs as required in the application form.Caste Certificate: If applicable, a valid caste certificate for SC/ST/OBC candidates.Migration Certificate: Mandatory for candidates from other universities.Character Certificate: Issued by the institution last attended.

reviews_list.review_title: Overall, infrastructure, placement, and campus life are average.

review_content.Placements: The placement rate at Gurukul Kangri Vishwavidyalaya is pretty good, like 80-90% students got placed, but mostly students prefer off-campus placements due to very low payment. The average package is around 4-5 LPA. The highest package offered is 12 LPA. Companies like Amazon, Infosys, HCL, Microsoft, etc., come here but do not provide much money.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is average, Wi-Fi and labs are available, but sometimes Wi-Fi does not work properly, classrooms have good capacity and have all the resources required for studies. The food at the hostel is good, there is a badminton and volleyball court available in the hostel, but the gym has not been available since last year due to some issues.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Review of GKV - Gurukula Kangri Vishwavidyalaya.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students in this college start preparation for GATE. But those who prepare for placement get placed in companies like Panasonic, Colors Code, IBM, Infosys, Wipro, TCS, and Google. The highest package offered is about 15 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 6 LPA. The average package offered is about 12 LPA. Most of the students get internships as a campus ambassador of Microsoft, in which they become a beta ambassador. Top roles offered by companies are software developer and cybersecurity intern.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are good, and they provide all the basic requirements. A very bad quality of food is served to students, and it is not hygienic. It provides medical facilities and sports facilities. The college has its own stadium named Dayanand Stadium. Classrooms have all the facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Gurukul Kangri Vishwavidyalaya - College Review

content.Placements: As this college is one of the popular GFTIs, most of the students get enough time to prepare for other exams too. Instead of this, about 80% of students sit for the placement round, and 60% succeed. The lowest package is 8 LPA, the highest package is 15 LPA, and the average package is 12 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, Google, Colors Code, IBM, etc. Roles offered include software intern and cybersecurity intern. About 50% in CSE and 100% in Electrical get internships and PPO from the company.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and buildings are too old because they are not being taken care of. The college is also spread over a very small area. However, classrooms have all the facilities, and the hostel is good to live in. Labs, library, and Wi-Fi are available in the college and hostel campus. The mess quality is good and hygienic, but sometimes they serve very bad food, mostly at night. Sports and games facilities are available because the college owns its own stadium called Dayanand Stadium.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of GKV - Gurukula Kangri Vishwavidyalaya.

content.Placements: About 60% of students get selected or placed in the CSE course because most of the students prepare for the GATE exam. The highest packages offered by companies are 15 LPA. The lowest is 8 LPA, and the average is 12 LPA per annum. Top recruiters include Microsoft, Google, Colors Code, IBM, Infosys, and TCS. About 50 to 60 students out of 250 get selected for this course. Roles like software developer and intern are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are above average. It is good to live in. All necessary equipment is available, including tables, beds, chairs, personal almirahs, etc. Classrooms have all the facilities like Wi-Fi and smart boards. Hostel facilities are good, and the food quality is okay. However, they don't serve good food in the end. In the beginning, the food quality is good, but after a few months, it becomes the worst. The mess and canteen are also on the college campus, and medical facilities are provided. There is a sports room where all the needed equipment is available.

Top recruiters are Microsoft, Google, Code Labs, IBM, Colors Code, etc. Roles like software intern, project manager are offered by the companies.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available here are extraordinary and well-furnished. All facilities related to the curriculum are there, but they should focus on the lab area because they don't change equipment every year. Hostel facilities are well and good. All required items are there, but the food quality is not so good and is not acceptable.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

faqs.question: What entrance exams are accepted by GKV Gurukula Kangri Vishwavidyalaya for admission to MCA?
faqs.answer: For admission to the MCA (Master of Computer Applications) program at Gurukula Kangri Vishwavidyalaya (GKV), Haridwar, the following entrance exams are accepted:1. CUET PG (Common University Entrance Test - Postgraduate): GKV accepts CUET PG scores for MCA admissions, which is a national-level exam conducted for postgraduate programs at central universities like GKV.2. NIMCET (NIT MCA Common Entrance Test): In some cases, GKV may also consider NIMCET scores, which is a national-level entrance exam for MCA programs conducted by NITs, although CUET PG has become the primary exam.Candidates must meet the minimum eligibility requirements and score the required cutoff in the respective entrance exams to qualify for admission.

hostel_campus.college_name: Gurukula Kangri Vishwavidyalaya Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Gurukul Kangri Vishwavidyalaya - College Review
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and buildings are too old because they are not being taken care of. The college is also spread over a very small area. However, classrooms have all the facilities, and the hostel is good to live in. Labs, library, and Wi-Fi are available in the college and hostel campus. The mess quality is good and hygienic, but sometimes they serve very bad food, mostly at night. Sports and games facilities are available because the college owns its own stadium called Dayanand Stadium.

reviews.review_heading: Review of GKV - Gurukula Kangri Vishwavidyalaya.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are above average. It is good to live in. All necessary equipment is available, including tables, beds, chairs, personal almirahs, etc. Classrooms have all the facilities like Wi-Fi and smart boards. Hostel facilities are good, and the food quality is okay. However, they don't serve good food in the end. In the beginning, the food quality is good, but after a few months, it becomes the worst. The mess and canteen are also on the college campus, and medical facilitie...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, infrastructure, placement, and campus life are average.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average, Wi-Fi and labs are available, but sometimes Wi-Fi does not work properly, classrooms have good capacity and have all the resources required for studies. The food at the hostel is good, there is a badminton and volleyball court available in the hostel, but the gym has not been available since last year due to some issues.

reviews.review_heading: Review of GKV - Gurukula Kangri Vishwavidyalaya.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are good, and they provide all the basic requirements. A very bad quality of food is served to students, and it is not hygienic. It provides medical facilities and sports facilities. The college has its own stadium named Dayanand Stadium. Classrooms have all the facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Gurukul Kangri University.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available here are extraordinary and well-furnished. All facilities related to the curriculum are there, but they should focus on the lab area because they don't change equipment every year. Hostel facilities are well and good. All required items are there, but the food quality is not so good and is not acceptable.

reviews.review_heading: Not great academically, average placements, but suitable for a low-cost B.Tech degree.
reviews.review_text: Hostel infrastructure is nice, but the food is worse. Approximate hostel fees vary from Rs. 40,000 to Rs. 62,000 per year, which includes a mess charge of around Rs. 25,000 and Rs. 3,000 as security money. Bus fees are around Rs. 7,000. GKV offers B.Tech in four streams CSE, ESE, EE, and ME.

reviews.review_heading: Gurukul Kangri Vishwavidyalaya - College review.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are well furnished, and the availability of all the essential items is there in the college, but the lab equipment is old, and they don't buy new gadgets every year, which is one of the drawbacks of the college. Hostel facilities are good enough, but the mess facilities are not so good, as they give unhygienic food, because of which we left the hostel after the end of our first year. A canteen is available on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Gurukul Kangri Vishwavidyalaya.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are good, also Wi-Fi and labs are too good, but food quality is very poor, nowadays they are taking the initiative to make better food. Overall, for the first time, I suggest you take a hostel in your first year. Make beautiful memories with your friends. Sports and games facilities are also there as we play GPL every year with our team, and cash prizes are there for the winning team.

reviews.review_heading: GKV - Haridwar College Review.
reviews.review_text: Department infrastructure is overwhelming, but it could be even better if they renovated it every year, at least by colors. All facilities are there like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library. Hostel facilities are not so good, but we can live there as they fulfill basic facilities, though the mess is the worst; food quality is very bad. Medical facilities are there. Sports and games are also played once during the sports fest.

reviews.review_heading: Gurukul Kangri University – Review
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the hostel is good but not very good, as it is very old, but they provide all the facilities. Labs and classrooms are well-furnished, and a playground and stadium with gym facilities are there. Hostel facilities are good, but mess food is not so good , it is the worst, I can say. Medical and sports facilities are also there.

reviews.review_heading: Its a good college, I know it does not have a good placement rate, but it gives knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Wi-fi is good, but classes are not as good as they used to be, the college is much bigger. There is a Hostel with simple but not very heavy facilities, but its good for those who come from a middle class family and who want to only study and not participate in other activities like hanging out with girls and vice versa.

reviews.review_heading: Gurukul kangri vishwavidyalaya - review.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good and well-equipped with Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are also there with all the facilities. The quality of the hostel are good but quality of the mess is not so good but food quality of the canteen is awesome and good but they take charges. Sports facilities are also there.

reviews.review_heading: Gurukul Kangri Vishwavidyalaya Review.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college and hostel was very primitive and old, and they did not take any action to improve it. The bathroom quality was also very bad. Classrooms were good, but hostel facilities were not good. Food quality was also the worst. College canteen was good, but they charge extra charges compared to others.

reviews.review_heading: Review of GKV - Gurukula Kangri Vishwavidyalaya.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good, but the infrastructure is not so good here. However, facilities like the library and Wi-Fi are accessible to all students. Classrooms are loaded with all the facilities, like projectors and digital boards. Hostel facilities are good, but the mess facilities are very bad here. Sports facilities are good, and medical facilities are available for all students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of GKV - Gurukula Kangri Vishwavidyalaya.
reviews.review_text: Old infrastructure is there but all facilities are there including Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library. Hostel facilities are good. But mess is not so good. Food quality is very bad. Sports facilities are there for every sport. They also provide medical facilities.

answer.text: Koustuv Research Institute of Medical Science (KRIMS) is a general Tier 2 institute. The placement record of KRIMS is low as compared to other institutes. Few companies come to the campus during the recruitment drives, and only modest salary packages are offered to the graduates. The Tier 1 institutes, on the other hand, have better placement options with higher salary packages and have an extensive network of industry connection. KRIMS thus offers quality education but with a placement outcome not equal to that of Tier 1 colleges. As a result, it is relatively less competitive in the job market compared to more-tiered institutions.

faqs.question: What entrance exams are accepted by Koustuv Research Institute of Medical Science for admission to B.Pharma?
faqs.answer: According to shiksha, two entrance exams are accepted for admissions in B.Pharma at Koustuv Research Institute of Medical Science:-OJEE (Odisha Joint Entrance Examination).NEET (National Eligibility cum Entrance Test) .So you need to appear in any one of these entrance exams. Cutoff will be released according to entrance exam scores of applicants and seats intake. You need to qualify in cutoff in order to secure your seat. The next NEET exam is expected to be conducted in may next year. And OJEE till june 2025. So if you are planning to take admission, you are adviced to prepare for entrance exams.

faqs.question: Is it easy to get admission in Koustuv Research Institute of Medical Science?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is not very difficult to take admission at Koustuv Research Institute of Medical sciences. This depends on the course you are pursuing also. If you are applying for B.Pharma, you need to clear the entrance exam (OJEE/NEET) because admissions for this course are entrance based. So if you have a favorable score in entrance exam and you qualify in the cutoff, you'll get admission easily. For other courses like B.Sc, D.Pharma, BMLT, the admissions are provided based on 12th score of the student.

faqs.question: Are admissions open at Koustuv Research Institute of Medical Science?
faqs.answer: Admissions are open for various programmes for 2023-24 sessions for the Koustuv Research Institute of Medical Science (KRIMS).

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Koustuv Research Institute of Medical Science?
faqs.answer: Hi,No, you can't get direct admission at Koustuv Research Institute of Medical Science.Koustuv Research Institute of Medical Science admission is entrance based for courses offered at UG and Certificate levels. Some of the popular exams accepted by the institution for admission are NEET, ISC, and Odisha CHSE, etc.Eligibility criteria:Passed 10+2 examination with Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects along with Mathematics/ Biology subject with valid JEE (Main) /OJEE / NEET Rank holder. Admission conducted by OJEE, Odisha through OJEE /JEE (Main) / NEET examination.Thanks

review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel is good. Student here enjoy full time with free Wi-Fi. Food quality is just like as previous day food. Life is good when nothing is bad.
