highlights.summary: Watch out this space for the latest news around Doaba Group of Colleges, Mohali Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. College offers B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and M.Sc. The Doaba Group of Colleges, Mohali course fee ranges between INR 27,500 to 3,91,200.

faqs.answer:
A:    Doaba Group of Colleges, Mohali has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.EdCandidates passed post graduation with 50% marks (5% relaxation for SC/ST candidates) from recognised university or institution are eligible to apply.B.ComThe given marks is for commerce students who have passed 10+2 examination.
Students who have opted for two of the following commerce subjects in 10+2 : Accountancy, Business Studies, Economics, Mathematics, Office Management and Secretarial Practice, Principle and Practice of Insurance, Tax Procedure and Practice should have minimum marks as 40% and 45% for other candidates.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th standard/SSC examination from any recognised board/council.B.E. / B.TechCandidates passed 10+2 with mandatory subjects along with one of the following subjects; Chemistry, Biology, Bio-technology, Computer Science from recognised board are eligible to apply.MBA/PGDMCandidates passed Bachelor's degree in any discipline from recognised university or institution are eligible to apply.
faqs.question: How can I get into Doaba Group of Colleges, Mohali for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?

faqs.answer: A:    Doaba Group of Colleges, Mohali courses are approved by eminent Government bodies such as NCTE, AICTE, PCI. The combined seats available for various programmes provided by Doaba Group of Colleges, Mohali goes up to 843.
faqs.question: How many seats are available at Doaba Group of Colleges, Mohali for all courses combined?

review_content.General: Regarding infrastructure, we have a separate building for our paramedical department, which has classrooms, a biochemistry lab, a microbiology lab, an operation theatre for practice, a radiology department, a library, a meeting room, a conference hall, etc. We have all the equipment required in the lab, along with various machines and instruments, fully calibrated. Wi-Fi is available. In hostels, there are shared rooms for two students, with good quality food in the mess. Moreover, extra activities such as NCC, NSS, Scout and Guide, basketball, football, volleyball, and athletics are available. An ambulance is always present on campus for any medical emergency.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: About my college and its placements.

review_content.Placements: Placements were not that good in Doaba Group of Colleges because there was little partnership with companies. But in other factors, like the study, it was satisfactory.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was good, and teachers were friendly with students. They worked hard to give their best in the curriculum. I suggested others take admission if they wanted to pursue a degree, but the placements were not so good according to my preference.
review_content.Faculty: The curriculum was followed as assigned by Punjab Technical University, Kapurthala, Jalandhar. Exams were semester-based, and two assignments were assigned to students per subject in per semester. Other activities are also done like cultural, educational, and other activities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It is a very nice college if we want to take a degree but placements are average.

review_content.Placements: Placements in the college are average. It totally depends on students' skills. Companies like Infosys, Idea, etc., visit the college to recruit students. In our course, they taught blockchain concepts, cryptography concepts, and many new computer science technologies. New roles as per demand are added to the course curriculum.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is free Wi-Fi for hostel students only. Classrooms are very neat and clean. The library is very nice. Hostels are average. The quality of the food is average. There are separate hostels for girls and boys. There are also sports and games facilities.

overview_faqs.question: Can Doaba Group of Colleges, Mohali be considered as a reputed Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Doaba Group of Colleges, Mohali are UG Diploma, B.Ed, B.Com, After 1th Diploma, BCA, BBA, B.Pharma, B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, Doaba Group of Colleges, Mohali has a rating of 3.7 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 3.9, 3.5, 4 and 3.8 as per reviews by students.

review_summary.college_name: Doaba Group of Colleges, Mohali Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and supportive staff.

content.Placements: My college is not so famous, but I can say more than average. If I am talking about placements, then not so many, but 3-4 companies came to the college for placement, and some of my classmates got jobs.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is best. There is so much garden greenery. One drawback in my college is that there is no Wi-Fi in the college, and also not in the hostel. If I am talking about food, then it is also average, not so good, not so bad. Can be eaten and survive.
content.Faculty: As I already told you about the staff of my college, the staff is supportive and good, but as we know, some of the teachers are not so bad, but also not so good. But apart from this, teachers help you a lot with everything. This college makes students industry-ready.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical lab Sciences - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, value for money, and good faculty.

content.Placements: I am a final-year student in the Bachelor’s program in Medical Laboratory Sciences at Doaba Group Of Colleges. I belong to the 2022 batch. Our batch is the first to graduate from this college, as the course was newly introduced. From our course, lab technicians and lab scientists are hired by reputed hospitals and laboratories. Some of the well-known hospitals and labs that recruit include Apollo, Lal Path Labs, Fortis Mohali, Government Hospital Phase 6 Mohali, and Max Hospital Mohali.
content.Infrastructure: Regarding infrastructure, we have a separate building for our paramedical department, which has classrooms, a biochemistry lab, a microbiology lab, an operation theatre for practice, a radiology department, a library, a meeting room, a conference hall, etc. We have all the equipment required in the lab, along with various machines and instruments, fully calibrated. Wi-Fi is available. In hostels, there are shared rooms for two students, with good quality food in the mess. Moreover, extra activities such as NCC, NSS, Scout and Guide, basketball, football, volleyball, and athletics are available. An ambulance is always present on campus for any medical emergency.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: About my college and its placements.

content.Placements: Placements were not that good in Doaba Group of Colleges because there was little partnership with companies. But in other factors, like the study, it was satisfactory.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was good, and teachers were friendly with students. They worked hard to give their best in the curriculum. I suggested others take admission if they wanted to pursue a degree, but the placements were not so good according to my preference.
content.Faculty: The curriculum was followed as assigned by Punjab Technical University, Kapurthala, Jalandhar. Exams were semester-based, and two assignments were assigned to students per subject in per semester. Other activities are also done like cultural, educational, and other activities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is a very nice college if we want to take a degree but placements are average.

content.Placements: Placements in the college are average. It totally depends on students' skills. Companies like Infosys, Idea, etc., visit the college to recruit students. In our course, they taught blockchain concepts, cryptography concepts, and many new computer science technologies. New roles as per demand are added to the course curriculum.
content.Infrastructure: There is free Wi-Fi for hostel students only. Classrooms are very neat and clean. The library is very nice. Hostels are average. The quality of the food is average. There are separate hostels for girls and boys. There are also sports and games facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: This is a good college for students to have a better future.

content.Placements: Around 80% of students got placed. Managers and supervisors give various opportunities to students to achieve their aims to be successful in their lives and can be well settled in their future. Many students got placed in different companies that offer a handsome salary.
content.Infrastructure: They provide good food items in the canteen as well as in mess. The labs are well organized and all the equipment are available. So the student can learn by doing practical things more than by depending on the books. The library is always open for the students.

faqs.answer:

Students who have opted for two of the following commerce subjects in 10+2 : Accountancy, Business Studies, Economics, Mathematics, Office Management and Secretarial Practice, Principle and Practice of Insurance, Tax Procedure and Practice should have minimum marks as 40% and 45% for other candidates.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th standard/SSC examination from any recognised board/council.B.E. / B.TechCandidates passed 10+2 with mandatory subjects along with one of the following subjects; Chemistry, Biology, Bio-technology, Computer Science from recognised board are eligible to apply.MBA/PGDMCandidates passed Bachelor's degr

faqs.answer: A:    Tezpur Medical College And Hospital has received an impressive review rating of 4.8 on Placements based on 5 feedback of verified Shiksha students.
faqs.question: Does Tezpur Medical College And Hospital provide good placement facilities?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Tezpur Medical College And Hospital is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as MBBS. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include MD and MS. The fee structure for the Tezpur Medical College And Hospital programmes is around INR 1,08,900 to 1,12,050.

faqs.answer: A:    Tezpur Medical College And Hospital is a well-known institution for MD, MS, MBBS courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Tezpur Medical College And Hospital has course specializations in Community Medicine, Obstetrics & Gynecology, General Surgery, Anaesthesia, Ophthalmology, Biochemistry, ENT, General Medicine, Microbiology, Orthopaedics, Psychiatry, Pathology.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is overall good.

review_content.Placements: About 90% of the students at our college are placed. The lowest salary package for an internship is Rs. 30,000. Approximately 100 students got internships. As healers, we play a very important role in society. We try our best to treat our patients.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our infrastructure is very beautiful and environment friendly. Our classes are in the audio-video mode, and our labs are very well-equipped. We have a central library and a personal library in each department. The hostel is good; we live in a three-seater room, which is quite bad.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Overall experience is good but the location of the college is not that great.

review_content.Placements: MBBS is a professional course so you don't need to worry about placements much. Study hard and make your way to success. You can join any private medical hospital or nursing home or you can open your clinic after passing out and doing 1-year internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: In this course, you can know how much the government spends on the medical service and on MBBS students. They provide the best possible labs and lecture hall. TMCH has a centrally air-conditioned lecture hall. We have well-equipped labs and many specimens and proper exposure to every aspect of education.

review_summary.college_name: Tezpur Medical College And Hospital Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is a government medical college with almost all facilities.

content.Placements: The course is for 4.5 years. After that, every student has to do one year of internships in the hospital if they pass the final exam. Almost 100% of students got internships. After that, they have to go for a one-year rural posting.
content.Infrastructure: It is a government medical college so every required facility is available in our college. Our college offers post-graduation degrees in different subjects. Our college has an attached hospital so every basic facility is available for people for their basic utility.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is a good government medical college with various facilities.

content.Placements: Our college provides 100% placements. We have to do internships in our college itself with a stipend of Rs. 33,000 per month. After internships, you have to do a compulsory one-year rural service if you are admitted through the state quota as a medical officer.
content.Infrastructure: Department labs and lecture halls are average. Our library timings are from 9 am to 9 pm. MBBS students get a hostel facility. The food served in the mess is average. Our college has 3 hostels. One hostel is under construction. The boys' hostel has attached washrooms.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college is overall good.

content.Placements: About 90% of the students at our college are placed. The lowest salary package for an internship is Rs. 30,000. Approximately 100 students got internships. As healers, we play a very important role in society. We try our best to treat our patients.
content.Infrastructure: Our infrastructure is very beautiful and environment friendly. Our classes are in the audio-video mode, and our labs are very well-equipped. We have a central library and a personal library in each department. The hostel is good; we live in a three-seater room, which is quite bad.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Overall experience is good but the location of the college is not that great.

content.Placements: MBBS is a professional course so you don't need to worry about placements much. Study hard and make your way to success. You can join any private medical hospital or nursing home or you can open your clinic after passing out and doing 1-year internship.
content.Infrastructure: In this course, you can know how much the government spends on the medical service and on MBBS students. They provide the best possible labs and lecture hall. TMCH has a centrally air-conditioned lecture hall. We have well-equipped labs and many specimens and proper exposure to every aspect of education.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Tezpur Medical College and Hospital.

content.Placements: The placement is provided by the college itself. About 99% of students get placed every year. The highest package is Rs. 40,000, the lowest is Rs. 30,000, and the average package is about Rs. 35,000. About all students of the college get internships from the college itself.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. Wi-Fi facility is available in the library. Classrooms are good enough. The library is allowed for every student. The hostel facility is good. The food facilities are good for non-vegetarians but not as good for vegetarians.

description: Tezpur Medical College And Hospital cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Tezpur Medical College And Hospital NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 24646 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Tezpur Medical College And Hospital MBBS cutoff 2025 was 24646 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 25090 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Tezpur Medical College And Hospital accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.
The 3rd round of seat allotment for Tezpur Medical College And Hospital NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been announced for MD, MS programmes for various categories under the All India quota.

For the General AI category, closing ranks varied from 4364 to 107311, with MD in Radio Diagnosis being the most challenging for admission. In 2024 and 2023, the same specialisation had a cutoff of 2684 and 3095, respectively. A multi-year comparison shows fluctuation in the cutoff trends for this category. To see m

Tezpur Medical College And Hospital accepts the NEET PG results for admission to PG-level medical courses, like MD and MS courses. For the MD specialisations, the most challenging one was MD in Radio Diagnosis, with a round 3 closing rank of 4364 for the General AI category.

reviews.review_heading: Tezpur Medical College and Hospital.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. Wi-Fi facility is available in the library. Classrooms are good enough. The library is allowed for every student. The hostel facility is good. The food facilities are good for non-vegetarians but not as good for vegetarians.

reviews.review_heading: It's worth taking admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: My college provides great facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. Faculty here are amazing and provides us with the best resources possible. Our hostel is good, and the quality of food is also good. My college is very good, and I like my college very much.

reviews.review_heading: My Tezpur Medical College.
reviews.review_text: The lab equipment is less as compared to the number of students in a group, which is about 42. This year, only one cadaver was provided. There is no Wi-Fi access in classrooms. If you are a Jio user, it is better to convert to Airtel because Jio doesn't work in lab. Library is not accessible during the initial few months of the first year.

reviews.review_heading: The college is decent with good facilities. Dissatisfied with the lack of extracurricular activities
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is decent. We are provided with air-conditioned libraries, the classroom has a ducting system for cooling, and the lecture halls are quite spacious. Although we are not provided with a canteen, other facilities are up to the mark. The hostel facilities are average, including a room where 3 people reside. Everyone is provided with a table and chair, and the mess food is decent as well. Food is nutritious, and the menu is diverse. Games are also played.

reviews.review_heading: The college I. e. Tezpur Medical college is providing a good teaching MBBS and PG courses. Overall.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is good and all facilities available 
Hostel facility is good Wi-Fi is provided and water is provided 24/7
Electricity is also provided all the time by the hostel management 
Mess is below average and the food is not so hygienic but overall is good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty members and good placement. Really good facilities .
reviews.review_text: Facilities are perfect. There is water supply, electricity supply and every hall has air conditions. The campus is so peaceful and there is a beautiful garden. There is playground, auditorium for cultural programs which is held every year everything is perfect .

reviews.review_heading: Our college is overall nice.
reviews.review_text: We have a very beautiful infrastructure. The available course is MBBS. We have a library, large classrooms, audio-video teaching methods, digital classrooms, and a hostel. The hostel is fine. We leave in a three-seater. We have a large playground where we can play football, cricket, and volleyball.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my every day hard work and joy.
reviews.review_text: Every lecture hall is air-conditioned, and the entire campus has trees. There is no problem regarding drainage. There is a cafeteria inside the college, and a hospital is available near the college.

highlights.summary:
WBJEE 2026 registration has begun for Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Science & Research admission to the BE/BTech course. Students can register till Apr 5, 2026, for the exam scheduled for May 24, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Science & Research offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from stream like Medicine & Health Sciences. College offers B.Pharma and D.Pharma courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.Pharma. The Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Science & Research course fee ranges between INR 2,09,000 to 5,50,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Science & Research offers Degree and Diploma courses including 2 UG and 1 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Science & Research has specializations such as M.Pharma specializations in Pharmaceutical.
faqs.question: Which major specializations are available at Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Science & Research?

faqs.answer: A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Science & Research is up to 178. Good thing to know is that Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Science & Research has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.
faqs.question: How many seats are available at Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Science & Research for all courses combined?

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Placements, Infrastructure and faculty are nice here.

review_content.Placements: In the last few years, our college placement percentage is increasing. Average percentage is 85%. In the last year, the highest package is 8.5 Lacs per year and the lowest one is 3.5 Lacs. GSK, Mankind, Cipla, Apollo pharmacy etc. are our recruiting companies. There is a placement cell present, this cell prepares the students for creating their CV great.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is Wi-Fi available in the campus and hostel. Lots of games present there and the food is good. Cricket ground and football ground are present in the campus. Vegetarian food is available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good and supportive college.

review_content.Placements: Almost 60% of students got on-campus placements. The placement cell is very active, but no big companies are coming to the campus. Only a few, like Sun Pharma and Cipla, came as big companies. Other companies like Cognizant, Wipro, and Apollo Hospitals came for recruitment. Due to COVID, no companies are giving internships physically. Our training cell is not that active in terms of contacting and approaching industries for internships. They are very much aware of COVID as well.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. The library has various books and relevant study materials. Laboratories are well-equipped, but the active ingredient date has expired, which is a bad thing. Computer labs can accommodate more than 30 people. Wi-Fi is available here. Classrooms are neat, clean, and well-maintained.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024

faqs.question: How can I get into Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Science & Research for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?

rows:
Candidates completed B.Pharma. from PCI approved recognised institute/ university are eligible to apply.
Candidate in final year are also eligible on provisional basis.
Candidate must have minimum age limit of 17 years and not more than 30 years as on 1 June 2022.
The lower age limit is 17 (seventeen) years as on 31.12.2022. A candidate should have been born on or before 31.12.2005. There is no upper age limit.

As per Shiksha verified reviews, Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Science & Research has a rating of 4.3 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.3 on campuslife, 4.2 on placements, 4.5 on faculty and 4.2 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Science & Research Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A smooth and straight review of BCPSR.

content.Placements: Approximately 70-80% of students from the total batch are placed. The highest package for 2024 was 8 LPA, the average was 5 LPA, and the lowest was 2.8 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Cipla, Torrent, Nestle, and Sun Pharma. Almost all students get an internship in their 3rd year.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good with all types of facilities, including sports, a gym, and walking/cycling areas. The total hostel fee is Rs. 72,000 for a year. The college provides a Wi-Fi connection, but not in 1st year. It will resume from the 3rd year. There is one hospital attached to the hostel, so no problem with health issues.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am very impressed with the Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences and Research, Durgapur.

content.Placements: Almost 95% of students get placed every year at this college. The lowest package is INR 2.8 L per annum and ranges to INR 8 L per annum. The top recruiting companies are Medplus, Apollo Hospital, and Sunpharma. Almost 90% of students get internships from the college. Our college offers the best education in pharmaceutics in the MPharm program.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in college but not unlimited. The college has good infrastructure with proper lighting and different labs for different subjects with all types of required instruments. The college also possesses an animal keeping house and a medicinal plant area.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Placements, Infrastructure and faculty are nice here.

content.Placements: In the last few years, our college placement percentage is increasing. Average percentage is 85%. In the last year, the highest package is 8.5 Lacs per year and the lowest one is 3.5 Lacs. GSK, Mankind, Cipla, Apollo pharmacy etc. are our recruiting companies. There is a placement cell present, this cell prepares the students for creating their CV great.
content.Infrastructure: There is Wi-Fi available in the campus and hostel. Lots of games present there and the food is good. Cricket ground and football ground are present in the campus. Vegetarian food is available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is a good and supportive college.

content.Placements: Almost 60% of students got on-campus placements. The placement cell is very active, but no big companies are coming to the campus. Only a few, like Sun Pharma and Cipla, came as big companies. Other companies like Cognizant, Wipro, and Apollo Hospitals came for recruitment. Due to COVID, no companies are giving internships physically. Our training cell is not that active in terms of contacting and approaching industries for internships. They are very much aware of COVID as well.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. The library has various books and relevant study materials. Laboratories are well-equipped, but the active ingredient date has expired, which is a bad thing. Computer labs can accommodate more than 30 people. Wi-Fi is available here. Classrooms are neat, clean, and well-maintained.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college with supportive faculty.

content.Placements: Placements are good enough. This year, 60 students out of 100 have been placed. About 80% get placed every year. Different medical companies and hospitals like Apollo Hospital, Pulsus, Macloids, and Cipla are coming here for recruitment.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. It is upgradable. All the instruments are working properly. When a chemical gets over, it is quickly rearranged. There is an inverter. In the canteen, non-veg food is not available. Every year, the college organises many sports events like cricket, badminton, etc.

The college provides a Wi-Fi connection, but not in 1st year. It will resume from the 3rd year. There is one hospital attached to the hostel, so no problem with health issues.

reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in college but not unlimited. The college has good infrastructure with proper lighting and different labs for different subjects with all types of required instruments. The college also possesses an animal keeping house and a medicinal plant area.

reviews.review_heading: Placements, Infrastructure and faculty are nice here.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi available in the campus and hostel. Lots of games present there and the food is good. Cricket ground and football ground are present in the campus. Vegetarian food is available.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good and supportive college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The library has various books and relevant study materials. Laboratories are well-equipped, but the active ingredient date has expired, which is a bad thing. Computer labs can accommodate more than 30 people. Wi-Fi is available here. Classrooms are neat, clean, and well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. It is upgradable. All the instruments are working properly. When a chemical gets over, it is quickly rearranged. There is an inverter. In the canteen, non-veg food is not available. Every year, the college organises many sports events like cricket, badminton, etc.

reviews.review_heading: It has average teachers, good extracurricular activities, environment and sports.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available and the library is huge. The labs are clean and well-maintained and classrooms are also great.

reviews.review_heading: I was somewhat satisfied with teachers and staff members behaviour and very good placements in 2018.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, and I would rate it 3.5 stars out of 5. The library has various books and relevant study materials. Laboratories are well-equipped, but the active ingredients date is expired, which is a bad thing. Computer labs have more than 30 capacities. Wi-Fi is available here. Classrooms are neat, clean and well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good like teaching staff members as well as sports.
reviews.review_text: Our infrastructure is very beautiful because it is lush green, and we feel good and get closer to nature. Wi-Fi is available both in the college and in the hostel. We get the average quality of food in the hostel. Medical facilities are available, and an ambulance is 24 hours available in the hostel as well as in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Some facts about B. C. P. S. R.
reviews.review_text: The college has many facilities like medicine garden, laboratory, computer room, library etc. In hostel food quality is average but the accommodation is good. Both the college & the hostel has Wi-Fi facility. In college sports and games facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and faculty members are good.
reviews.review_text: The campus is Wi-Fi enabled including the hostel. Classrooms are quite good and hygienic. The library allows various types of books along with magazines, daily newspapers etc. Air-conditioned digitised classrooms are available. Medical facilities like first aid are available.

reviews.review_heading: Best when compared to all private colleges in West Bengal.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. All the time it is upgrading itself. This year the college is also proposed to start PharmD course. Wi-Fi is available up to 34 MB. The books are available in the library all the time. Chemical and apparatus are also available. Sometimes, if it gets completed, it will be quickly arranged.

reviews.review_heading: Best in others average college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not so good. It is upgradable. All the instruments are not working properly. Sometime chemical gets end but it is quickly rearrange. The college is not fully covered by air conditioner. But there is inverter. In canteen non veg food is not available.

reviews.review_heading: Bengal College of Pharmaceutical Sciences and Research is the best college of Durgapur.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are very good, and the laboratory is very helpful. Library provides many international books and papers. Wi-Fi service is available here. The medical facilities are also available. Sports classes are also available in a weekend. Projector classes are very often.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of facilities, infrastructure, good placement.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is good. Labs are well maintained. Library is good and the environment of library is so peaceful. Classroom is also well maintained. Medical facilities, canteen, sports and game all facilities are also good and sports and games are good and the playground is also well maintained.

hostel.description: Institute provides excellent accommodation facilities with well furnished double and four occupancy rooms, Sprawling and Artistic layout, Hygienic Kitchen, Spacious Dining Halls, Indoor Courts for Shuttle & Table Tennis. Every hostels are provided with STD and ISD call services. The rooms of the hostel are fully furnished with wooden furnitures along with an attatched washrooms. The mess attached to the hostel is comparable to any of the international hostel, provided with modern equipments like Baine Marie System, Steam Boilers, Cold storage Room, Steam Dish Washers, etc.

library.description: Vivekananda Dental College for Women has a huge library set with 8000 sq.ft and natural lighting and air conditioned for the comfort of readers. It has the capacity to accommodate more than 300 students at a time. The library is well equipped with modern facilities and resources in the form of online databases, books, journals, back volumes of journals, WHO publications etc. The library has more than three thousand books in circulation section and has regular subscription of more than eighty International & National journals on Health Sciences. The digital library has comprehensive collection of CD-ROM, e-Journals, on-line Journals. The library has membership with DELNET, TERRI, British Council Library and National Geographic

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery(BDS) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: A place to discover everything except practicing on the patient.

review_content.Placements: We were 100 students enrolled in a batch. There are no placements, after college you are on your own. Also, there are no packages. We get a mandatory internship from our college itself. It depends on the student how well or badly they treat the patients and depending on that they are given patients to treat.
review_content.Infrastructure: We only have a small library but the collection of books on dental subjects is decent. The classrooms were pretty okay, no complaints there. The overall infrastructure of the college has always been under construction from I enrolled till the day I left college. The canteen and the mess food is not good. There are no sports or games facilities provided by the college itself. Also, there are no updated medical facilities except a really old hospital at the gate of the college.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee range for the courses offered at College of Dental Sciences and Research Centre?
overview_faqs.answer: The fee bracket for programs offerred by the College of Dental Sciences and Research Centre is approximately INR 750000 - INR 2700000.

overview_faqs.question: Can College of Dental Sciences and Research Centre be considered as a reputed Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: College of Dental Sciences and Research Centre is a distinguished institution offering MDS, BDS. Students can choose these programs to launch their careers in the Medicine & Health Sciences field. College of Dental Sciences and Research Centre is known for its dedicated and experienced faculty members committed to delivering these courses. College of Dental Sciences and Research Centre has received an impressive review rating of 2.6 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has earned ratings of 3 for Campus Life, 3 for Placements, 3 for Faculty, and 2 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: College of Dental Sciences and Research Centre Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery(BDS) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: A place to discover everything except practicing on the patient.

content.Placements: We were 100 students enrolled in a batch. There are no placements, after college you are on your own. Also, there are no packages. We get a mandatory internship from our college itself. It depends on the student how well or badly they treat the patients and depending on that they are given patients to treat.
content.Infrastructure: We only have a small library but the collection of books on dental subjects is decent. The classrooms were pretty okay, no complaints there. The overall infrastructure of the college has always been under construction from I enrolled till the day I left college. The canteen and the mess food is not good. There are no sports or games facilities provided by the college itself. Also, there are no updated medical facilities except a really old hospital at the gate of the college.

admission_process.title: College of Dental Sciences and Research Centre Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: College of Dental Sciences and Research Centre admissionis based on the exam score of the aspirants. The institute accepts scores in NEET, NEET MDS, and Gujarat NEET. Candidates are required to fill out the application form online at the official website of College of Dental Sciences and Research Centre. The college offers programmes in Medicine and Health Sciences streams.
The college offers UG courses for 5 years. For programmes at the PG level, the duration is 3 years.

The total fee ofCollege of Dental Sciences and Research Centreincludes various components, such as caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc. Aspirants have to pay the course fee at the time of admission for seat confirmation.

courses_data.name: College of Dental Sciences and Research Centre BDS Admission 2025
courses_data.description: College of Dental Sciences and Research Centre BDSis offered to candidates at the UG level. Candidates are required to participate in the entrance-based admission process to be considered for the final admission offer. Candidates are shortlisted for the BDS programme based on their performance in the entrance exam. Candidates who qualify in the admission process are eligible to secure their seat in the 5 years programme.

courses_data.name: College of Dental Sciences and Research Centre MDS Admission 2025
courses_data.description: College of Dental Sciences and Research Centre offers a full time MDS course. This course is offered at PG level. Admission is based on entrance exams, such as NEET MDS. Students can choose from various specialisations includingOrthodontics , Periodontology and Prosthodontics, etc. The total tuition fees for the course isINR 8,17,500 - 30,00,000.College of Dental Sciences and Research Centre MDSis a 3 years programme. description: College of Dental Sciences and Research Centre cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

College of Dental Sciences and Research Centre NEET UG cutoff 2024 has been announced for admission to the BDS course. The institute offers admission to the Bachelor of Dental Surgery(BDS) course based on candidates’ performance in the NEET UG exam. Eligible candidates are then called for the counselling rounds for final admission. During the College of Dental Sciences and Research Centre 2024 cut off, the last round closing rank for BDS admission was 864208. For more information, refer to

As per the College of Dental Sciences and Research Centre BDS cutoff 2024, the last round closing rank was 864208 for the General HS category students. The cutoff for the same course was 381979 in 2023 and 854382 in 2022 for admission. So, analysing the cutoff trends over three years, BDS saw inconsistency in its last-round closing ranks for the students belonging to the General HS category.

College of Dental Sciences and Research Centre accepts NEET UG scores for admission to the BDS course. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the important NEET UG dates for admission to College of Dental Sciences and Research Centre.

College of Dental Sciences and Research Centre Gujarat NEET PG cutoff 2024 was released for the concluding round. The cutoff was released as opening-closing ranks for MD and MS admission. Candidates seeking admission to top courses such as MD in Pathology and MD in Radio Diagnosis must aim to secure up to 1705 and 2927 or less for admission.
